evals.prompt: The requirements capability has already been activated because acceptance criteria are missing. Clarify the expected behavior for adding automatic retry to a payment callback without designing the implementation yet.
evals.expected_output: A compact requirements record that identifies the unresolved behavior, asks only decision-changing questions, and defines observable acceptance criteria.

evals.prompt: The requirements capability has already been activated because two teams use the term workspace differently. Resolve the vocabulary and acceptance boundary before planning the migration.
evals.expected_output: A terminology decision with explicit in-scope and out-of-scope meanings, remaining unknowns, and testable acceptance conditions.
